text:
Created attachment 217375
patch to update to 1.6

currently skype login is broken on 1.5


alt login: "Login error: No handler found for resource (code 40499)"
non-alt login: "Failed getting Magic T value, please try logging in via browser first"


updating to 1.6 allows me to login via the alt login
